message:
fix: process cleanup simplification and unused import removal

agent.rs:
- Prefix unused err_string with underscore to suppress warning (the
  variable was added for error context but not yet wired to output)

extension_dispatcher.rs:
- Remove unused SyncSender import (follow-up from prior channel change
  to unbounded mpsc::channel)

extensions.rs:
- Correct pump_stream signature in exec_ref path back to SyncSender —
  this path uses a bounded sync_channel for backpressure on large
  output captures, unlike the exec streaming path which was correctly
  changed to unbounded Sender

rpc.rs:
- Simplify bash process kill on cancellation: ignore kill() result and
  set status_code = -1 unconditionally — the previous match on
  guard.kill() was extracting a status code that was always discarded
  in favor of the cancelled=true path

tools.rs:
- Simplify grep tool process kill: ignore kill() result with let _ =
  instead of propagating as a tool error — kill failures on process
  cleanup are not actionable and were causing spurious error messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
